expectations.text: Identifies removing 'processing' from UIBackgroundModes as the fix
expectations.evidence: Response recommends ADDING BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers as an empty array. It says 'Add BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers to ios/Runner/Info.plist' and 'Do NOT remove UIBackgroundModes'. This is the opposite of the correct fix.

expectations.text: Explains WHY removing it is correct (app doesn't use BGTaskScheduler)
expectations.evidence: Response gives incorrect reasoning: 'Apple enforces a strict requirement: any app declaring background modes via UIBackgroundModes must explicitly list which Background Task Scheduler identifiers it uses.' This is wrong — the correct approach when not using BGTaskScheduler is to remove the 'processing' mode.

expectations.text: Shows the exact XML line to remove or edit in Info.plist
expectations.evidence: Response shows XML for adding BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers (wrong fix), not for removing 'processing' from UIBackgroundModes

expectations.text: Does NOT suggest adding BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers as the fix (that would be wrong for an app that doesn't use it)
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly recommends: 'Add BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers to ios/Runner/Info.plist. This can be: 1. Empty array (if you don't actually use BGTaskScheduler)'. This is the wrong approach.
